sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16574" key="a)strabeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρᾰβ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n16574.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ride a mule,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
